caption: A screen recording displays a text editor with a configuration file open, likely for a logging system. The editor is split vertically, showing the same file content on both the left and right sides. The text includes configuration parameters such as "input-kubernetes.conf," "tail," and "Path /var/log/containers/apacheログ," alongside log entries starting with "printail_2" and timestamps. Phrases like "level=info," "msg=Started partner," and "HTTP_Listen 0.0.0.0:2020" are visible throughout the code. As the video progresses, the user scrolls down through the configuration file, revealing additional sections like "filter-kubernetes.conf" and "output-loki.conf." The right side of the screen mirrors the movements of the left side, showing the same lines of code being scrolled past. The interface includes a dark theme with syntax highlighting in various colors and a status bar at the bottom indicating "0:less" and a line counter.
